notifMilestoneTitle.desc: Notification title shown when the user reaches a sober-day milestone.

notifSavingsTitle.desc: Notification title shown when the user reaches a money-saved milestone.

notifMeetingTitle.desc: Notification title for a scheduled recovery meeting / sponsor call / therapy reminder.

notifTestBody.en: Test notification — your reminders are working.
notifTestBody.desc: Body of the diagnostic test notification fired from Settings to verify the reminder pipeline. Keep the em dash (—).

notifSavingsBody.en: You've saved {amount} through sobriety. Keep going!
notifSavingsBody.desc: Body of the savings-milestone notification. {amount} is a pre-formatted currency string (e.g. "$100").

notifMeetingBody.desc: Meeting-reminder notification body when no location is set. {title} is the meeting name, {time} is a 24h HH:mm clock label.

notifMeetingBodyLocation.desc: Meeting-reminder notification body when a location is set. {title} is the meeting name, {time} is a 24h HH:mm clock label, {location} is the place. Keep the middle dot separator ( · ).

notifMorning0.en: Good morning. Your recovery is worth showing up for today.
notifMorning0.desc: Morning daily-motivation notification body, variant 0 of 5 (chosen by day-of-year rotation).

notifMorning1.en: One day at a time. You've got this — check in now.
notifMorning1.desc: Morning daily-motivation notification body, variant 1 of 5. Keep the em dash (—).

notifMorning2.en: Morning check-in — Log your mood and set your intentions.
notifMorning2.desc: Morning daily-motivation notification body, variant 2 of 5. Keep the em dash (—).

notifMorning3.en: Your sober journey continues today. Open the app and check in.
notifMorning3.desc: Morning daily-motivation notification body, variant 3 of 5.

notifMorning4.en: A new day, a fresh start. Take a moment to ground yourself.
notifMorning4.desc: Morning daily-motivation notification body, variant 4 of 5.

notifEvening0.en: You've made it through another day — Log your progress.
notifEvening0.desc: Evening daily-reminder notification body, variant 0 of 5. Keep the em dash (—).

notifEvening1.en: Evening check-in — How did your day go? Log it and reflect.
notifEvening1.desc: Evening daily-reminder notification body, variant 1 of 5. Keep the em dash (—).

notifEvening2.en: Don't forget to log today before it slips away.
notifEvening2.desc: Evening daily-reminder notification body, variant 2 of 5.

notifEvening3.en: Great job today — Take a moment to reflect and log your day.
notifEvening3.desc: Evening daily-reminder notification body, variant 3 of 5. Keep the em dash (—).

notifEvening4.en: You kept going today. Log tonight before you sleep.
notifEvening4.desc: Evening daily-reminder notification body, variant 4 of 5.

notifMilestone1d.en: 1 Day Sober. The first step is the hardest. You showed up.

notifMilestone2d.en: 2 Days Sober. Two days in a row. You're doing this.

notifMilestone3d.en: 3 Days Sober. Day three is one of the hardest. You're still here.

notifMilestone5d.en: 5 Days Sober. Five days of showing up for yourself.

notifMilestone7d.en: 7 Days Sober. One full week — that takes real courage.
notifMilestone7d.desc: Body of the 7-day (one week) sober-milestone notification. Keep the em dash (—).

notifMilestone10d.en: 10 Days Sober. Double digits. Quietly, steadily, you keep going.

notifMilestone14d.en: 14 Days Sober. Two weeks. Your body and mind are already responding.
notifMilestone14d.desc: Body of the 14-day (two weeks) sober-milestone notification.

notifMilestone21d.en: 21 Days Sober. Three weeks. New routines are starting to take root.
notifMilestone21d.desc: Body of the 21-day (three weeks) sober-milestone notification.

notifMilestone30d.en: 30 Days Sober. One month of choosing yourself, one day at a time.
notifMilestone30d.desc: Body of the 30-day (one month) sober-milestone notification.

notifMilestone60d.en: 60 Days Sober. Two months. Every single day has mattered.
notifMilestone60d.desc: Body of the 60-day (two months) sober-milestone notification.

notifMilestone90d.en: 90 Days Sober. Three months. Keep going at your own pace.
notifMilestone90d.desc: Body of the 90-day (three months) sober-milestone notification.

notifMilestone180d.en: 180 Days Sober. Half a year. That's a lot of days showing up.
notifMilestone180d.desc: Body of the 180-day (half a year) sober-milestone notification.

notifMilestone365d.en: 1 Year Sober. 365 days. Take a moment to acknowledge how far you've come.
notifMilestone365d.desc: Body of the 1-year (365 days) sober-milestone notification.

notifMilestone730d.en: 2 Years Sober. Two years of choosing yourself, over and over again.

notifMilestone1095d.en: 3 Years Sober. Three years. Your path forward is your own.
